title: Junior Business Development Manager at Square Yards

jsonLd.title: Junior Business Development Manager at Square Yards
jsonLd.description:
Are you a skilled Business Development Manager looking for your next big career move? Square Yards in Bhubaneswar offers you the perfect platform to grow professionally and personally.

About Square Yards:
Square Yards is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Provide advisory services on property investment and market trends
• Maintain a pipeline of qualified leads using CRM software
• Liaise with banks and NBFCs for home loan assistance to customers
• Negotiate pricing, terms, and conditions on behalf of clients
• Conduct market research and provide competitive analysis
• Build relationships with channel partners and brokers
• Manage RERA documentation and compliance requirements

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• MBBS / MD / MS from recognized medical college
• 1-3 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Property Valuation
• Proficiency in Contract Management
• Proficiency in Investment Analysis
• Proficiency in Real Estate Law
• Proficiency in Title Search
• Proficiency in RERA Compliance
• Proficiency in Negotiation Skills
• Proficiency in Market Research

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Annual performance appraisal
• Learning & development budget
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Flexible working hours
• Life and accident insurance
• Salary Range: 4 LPA - 9 LPA per annum

Location: Bhubaneswar, Odisha, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Square Yards!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: MBBS / MD / MS from recognized medical college
